testcase.name: test_no_seeded_job_has_legacy_coding_key

failure.message: AssertionError: Job IT4 Test Job 7a7fd2 missing coding_tasks list; got <class 'NoneType'> assert False + where False = isinstance(None, list) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f7e3ad4f00>('coding_tasks') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f7e3ad4f00> = {}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration6.py:105: in test_no_seeded_job_has_legacy_coding_key assert isinstance(a.get("coding_tasks"), list), f"Job {j['title']} missing coding_tasks list; got {type(a.get('coding_tasks'))}" E AssertionError: Job IT4 Test Job 7a7fd2 missing coding_tasks list; got <class 'NoneType'> E assert False E + where False = isinstance(None, list) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f7e3ad4f00>('coding_tasks') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f7e3ad4f00> = {}.get
